nidhi-menon/HealthSteward.description: HealthSteward is a privacy-first AI agent that centralizes your health across multiple doctors, autonomously generates personalized visit prep, tracks medications and tests, and coordinates care - all locally on your machine without exposing data to the cloud.

nidhi-menon/StackOverflow-Data-Analytics.description: Course project as part of CSE 6242 at GeorgiaTech under Dr. Duen Horng (Polo) Chau in Fall 2017
